title: phoenix humilis var. loureiroi
intro: Phoenix humilis var. loureiroi, also known as the Loureiro's Date Palm or Philippine Date Palm, is a plant species within the Arecaceae family, specifically a variety of the Phoenix humilis palm tree native to the Philippines. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Phoenix humilis var. loureiroi include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting immune function, while its extracts have been shown to have antioxidant and antiproliferative effects. Phoenix humilis var. loureiroi can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as tinctures, infusions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
